content.json:
# Syslog Traffic — Ingestion Health & Silent Hosts
**Theme:** Syslog traffic monitoring · **Data source:** `Syslog` + `Heartbeat`.

Detects hosts that send heartbeats but no syslog (collection gap), hosts that went silent, ingestion latency, and per-host facility coverage.

> The 'silent' window (2h) and latency are tunable — match to expected logging cadence.

content.query: let syslogHosts = Syslog | distinct Computer; Heartbeat | distinct Computer | where Computer !in (syslogHosts) | project Computer, Note='Heartbeat but no Syslog'
content.title: Hosts with heartbeat but no syslog (collection gap)

content.query: Syslog | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by Computer | extend MinutesSilent=datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastSeen) | where MinutesSilent > 120 | sort by MinutesSilent desc
content.title: Hosts gone silent (> 2h)

content.query: Syslog | where isnotempty(EventTime) | extend LatencySec=datetime_diff('second', TimeGenerated, todatetime(EventTime)) | summarize AvgLatencySec=avg(LatencySec), MaxLatencySec=max(LatencySec) by Computer | sort by MaxLatencySec desc
content.title: Ingestion latency (TimeGenerated vs EventTime)

content.query: Syslog | summarize Facilities=dcount(Facility), FacilityList=make_set(Facility) by Computer | sort by Facilities desc
content.title: Facility coverage per host
